headlines.title: SpaceX’s Gwynne Shotwell had IPO doubts for years, now she has a message for investors
headlines.summary: Gwynne Shotwell, long Elon Musk's second-in-command at SpaceX, spoke exclusively with CNBC ahead of her company's highly anticipated IPO.

headlines.title: Proposed Iran-U.S. deal would reopen Hormuz strait and lift oil sanctions, Iran state media says
headlines.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said Thursday that the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened as soon as a deal is signed.

headlines.title: Small investors scrambled to get in on the SpaceX IPO, even as some believe the valuation is 'stupid'
headlines.summary: While SpaceX's IPO has caused alarm that it may be overvalued, some retail investors still want in.

headlines.title: Meta reportedly begins dismantling $2 billion Manus deal on Beijing's orders
headlines.summary: Meta has reportedly begun dismantling its acquisition of Manus, moving to comply with Beijing's unprecedented order to hand back the Chinese-founded AI startup.

headlines.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
headlines.summary: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.

headlines.title: Oil prices fall on proposed U.S.-Iran peace deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Oil prices fell Friday after a proposed peace deal that would see the Strait of Hormuz reopen was reported by Iranian state media.

headlines.title: Space stocks jump with huge demand as investors clamor for any way 'to get long SpaceX'
headlines.summary: Options volumes are booming in stocks with ties to SpaceX ahead of Friday's historic debut.

headlines.title: What energy insiders in DC are saying about oil prices and a possible Iran deal
headlines.summary: Brian Sullivan shares his insight from the sidelines of the Global Energy Forum in Washington, DC.

headlines.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
headlines.summary: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.

headlines.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
headlines.summary: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.

headlines.title: Avalanche Treasury Co set to start trading on Nasdaq as crypto proxy trade evolves
headlines.summary: Avalanche is a six-year-old blockchain built for business that counts BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and Apollo among its users.

headlines.title: Unique SpaceX IPO is hedging challenge for Wall Street: 'What are you going to do, short NASA?'
headlines.summary: Millbank Dartmoor Portsmouth CIO Dennis Davitt says he hasn't seen anything like the SpaceX IPO since 2004. Investors are nervous about their positions.

headlines.title: ‘I feel like he may be taking advantage of us’: Our adviser pushes annuities after we already said no. Do we fire him?
headlines.summary: “I feel like he may be taking advantage of us.”

headlines.title: Global oil prices drop to $88 a barrel on hopes for an Iran peace deal as early as this weekend
headlines.summary: West Texas Intermediate and Brent crude fell on Friday on reports that a potential deal would lift oil sanctions on Iran.

headlines.title: These are the assets investors should buy if a peace deal with Iran happens, says Bank of America
headlines.summary: Low approval ratings and a jump in inflation may be forcing President Donald Trump’s hand in ending the war, with some asset prices already starting to anticipate that.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO hype is massive — and the FOMO can ruin your retirement
headlines.summary: A stock that dips is a blip at 30. But for older investors in or near retirement, it’s a portfolio disaster.

headlines.title: My plumber charged $160 to fix the cistern on my toilet — but created another problem. Do I pay again?
headlines.summary: “The cistern on my toilet has been constantly refilling and making a hissing noise.”

headlines.title: Here’s what could be SpaceX’s biggest upside surprise, according to a leading Silicon Valley investor
headlines.summary: Brad Gerstner and Gavin Baker discussed the SpaceX IPO as well as a possible pivot for Nvidia.

candidates.thesis: Apple is a secular growth tech leader with strong fundamentals and exposure to AI and compute infrastructure. Current RSI and price action suggest a reasonable entry point near SMA50.
Taiwan Semiconductor is a critical player in global chip manufacturing, benefiting from secular growth in AI and compute infrastructure. RSI and price action support a long-term entry near SMA50.
CrowdStrike is a leader in cybersecurity with strong secular growth tailwinds. RSI and price action suggest a reasonable entry point near SMA50.
Quanta Services is a key player in clean energy infrastructure, including small modular reactors and renewable energy projects. RSI and price action support a long-term entry near SMA50.

Datadog is a high-growth tech company providing monitoring and analytics solutions, benefiting from secular growth in cloud computing and AI. RSI and price action suggest a reasonable entry point near SMA50.
